configurations.name: Playdate: Launch Simulator
args: SIM="${env:PLAYDATE_SDK_PATH}/bin/Playdate Simulator.app"; [[ -d $SIM ]] || SIM="/Users/dlorant/Developer/PlaydateSDK/bin/Playdate Simulator.app"; [[ -d $SIM ]] || SIM="/Applications/PlaydateSDK/bin/Playdate Simulator.app"; if [[ ! -d $SIM ]]; then echo 'Playdate Simulator not found. Set PLAYDATE_SDK_PATH or install SDK to /Applications or /Users/dlorant/Developer/PlaydateSDK' >&2; exit 127; fi; /usr/bin/open -na "$SIM" --args ${workspaceFolder}/Build/BrickBreaker.pdx
